name: FOE: Scorpion Stun Gun
description: Imagine a catapult for ball lightnings. An enormous charge of electricity is accumulated until a ion storm erupts and is hurled into the unexpecting enemy, overloading and stupifying its circuits with such force that even shields are helpless. Though actually completely unguided, the ion ball greedily strives into the next hapless target to uncharge, creating the same impression of a fierce hunt by a barely controllable beast which already haunted our ancestors millennia ago. 	The relation to scorpions is a bit far fetched. Becca Finmeccanica's Research Department was commissioned by a secret customer with the codename "The Last of the First" to design a high-velocity penetrator weapon which should cause minimal hull damage but would release a knock-out gas into the targeted ship to render the crew unconscious. This working principle was associated with scorpion stings, though the intention was of course of absolutely humane nature, namely to spare lifes. Nevertheless absurd rumours circulated around this project involving nerve gas and reptiloids. 	One way or the other, after a series of accidents with of course no deaths at all, and a rapid increase in expenditures, an internal investigation was carried out, supervised by CEO Tom Becca IX. himself. After revealing schemes of corrupt managers, the involvement of green people and tests on innocent squirrels, Becca understood how that would read in the company's annual report. After the external cleaners completed their job, the project was reassigned to chief-engineer Archie Mendes and formalized as if it has always been his. Mendes got free rule, and, well, here we are.

name: FOE: Scorpion Stun Turret
description: Imagine a giant catapult for ball lightnings. A enormous charge of electricity is accumulated until a ion storm erupts and is hurled into the unexpecting enemy, overloading and stupifying its circuits with such force that even shields are helpless. Though actually completely unguided, the ion ball greedily strives into the next hapless target to uncharge, creating the same impression of a fierce hunt by a barely controllable beast which already haunted our ancestors hundreds of years ago. 	The relation to scorpions is a bit far fetched. Becca Finmeccanica's Research Department was commissioned by a secret customer with the codename "The Last of the First" to design a high-velocity penetrator weapon which should cause minimal hull damage but will release a knock-out gas into the targeted ship to render the crew unconscious. This working principle was associated with scorpion stings, though the intention was of course of absolutely humane nature, namely to spare lifes. Nevertheless absurd rumours circulated around this project involving nerve gas and reptiloids. 	One way or the other, after a series of accidents with of course no deaths at all, and a rapid increase in expenditures, an internal investigation was carried out, supervised by CEO Tom Becca IX. himself. After revealing schemes of corrupt managers, the involvement of green people and tests on innocent squirrels, Becca understood how that would read in the company's annual report. After the external cleaners completed their job, the project was reassigned to chief-engineer Archie Mendes and formalized as if it has always been his. Mendes got free rule, and, well, here we are.

name: Syracusia Tractor Beam
description: A powerful tractor beam turret which truly vacuums the void from any flotsam. For rapid orientation it had to be equipped with control nozzles, pushing it into position in a second. Becca Finmeccanica is one of only two manufacturers able to produce equipment which can endure the occurring material stress. 	When Becca Finmeccanica's chief engineer Archie Mendes was asked whether he could provide a long-range high-performance attractor for the new generation of mining Behemoths, he replied "Give me a ship to stand on, and I will move planets". Just in case he was forbidden via a contract addendum 1337 to go aboard any ship as long as he works for Finmeccanica, in exchange for a generous bonus payment.

name: Etna Mining Ray
description: This heat ray basically melts out desired minerals from asteroids. This technology had its breakthrough only recently and is therefore more expensive than the classical mining laser, however it's significantly more effective. 	During a bath in the caldarium of the thermae in Becca Finmeccanica's main research facility, the chief engineer Achie Mendes had the inspiration that one could wash out asteroids by heat. Being overwhelmed by this spark of an idea, he jumped out without dressing, running to his laboratory nakedly and calling out "Erika! Erika!" for the company's chief technology officer. Though the work on the heat project was approved enthusiastically, contract addendum 2442 forbids Archie to use the company thermae. Instead a private office bathroom was set up.

name: Etna Mining Ray Turret
description: This heat ray basically melts out desired minerals from asteroids. This technology had its breakthrough only recently and is therefore more expensive than the classical mining laser, however it's significantly more effective. 	During a bath in the caldarium of the thermae in Becca Finmeccanica's main research facility, the chief engineer Achie Mendes had the inspiration that one could wash out asteroids by heat. Being overwhelmed by this spark of an idea, he jumped out without dressing, running to his laboratory nakedly and calling out "Erika! Erika!" for the company's chief technology officer. Though the work on the heat project was approved enthusiastically, contract addendum 2442 forbids Archie to use the company thermae. Instead a private office bathroom was set up.

name: FOE: Autocannon Shell
description: Autocannons rapidly fire large-caliber shells, having longer ranges and greater terminal performance than the smaller-caliber kinetic projectiles fired my machine guns like the Gatling. 	These autocannon shells are a collective group of ammunition. Depending on the weapon one has bought them for they can be of explosive as well as armor-piercing character.

name: FOE: Sekhmet Autocannon
description: Autocannons have continuously been developed further. This current state-of-the art model is the result of a cooperation between Delta V and the Syndicate. Named after ancient Egypt's lioness goddess of war, the Sekhmet AC is a deadly weapon in the hand of any halfway capable captain or fleet commander. Firing triple-bursts of explosive large-caliber shells which don't have to impact on the target, but trigger when being close-by, even fast and maneuverable opponents can be handled properly. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

name: FOE: Sekhmet Dual Autocannon
description: The dual-barrel version of the Sekhmet AC fires two alternating triple-bursts of explosive large-caliber shells, such densening the explosive projectile hail going down on the enemy. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

name: FOE: Mafdet Autocannon
description: Named after ancient Egypt's cheetah goddess of judgment and execution, the Mafdet AC is the long-range high-precision sibling of the Sekhmet.  Applying a highly classified technology derived from the railgun concept -- kept secret especially from their Syndicate business partners --, Delta V was able to accelerate projectiles with such force, that common explosive shells did break apart. Hence the Mafdet shoots armor-piercing shells with less explosives but a hardened case. Even a shield doesn't protect the target completely, as after impact the shells' splinters continue their way to the hull. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

name: FOE: Bastet Autocannon Turret
description: Named after ancient Egypt's cat goddess of protection, the Bastet AC is the turreted sibling of the Sekhmet. Originally designed mainly as a defensive weapon against fighters and interceptors, it turned out to be equally useful in attack.  Equipped with an own targeting computer, this turret not only does not need a human operator, but also allows to lead the burst-fired guided explosive shells to the target, employing the ship's sensor systems. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

name: FOE: Mortar Blaster
description: The largest blaster gun on the market was designed as an ammo-less alternative for torpedoes, to be used by fast and agile ships in bombing runs against larger capital ships.

name: FOE: Rapidfire Blaster Turret
description: The Rapidfire Blaster Turret was created for the defense of trading ships against fast flying attackers. By removing one of the barrels of a Blaster Turret, but keeping the same socket, the freed power capacities can be used to increase the fire rate, the projectile speed and turn rate, at lower space needs. The disadvantages of earlier dissipating energy bolts, lower accuracy, and stronger heat stress on the remaining barrel, most merchants willingly accept, as long as the Rapidfire keeps pirates long enough away till the next hyperjump.

name: FOE: Light Tractor Beam
description: A lighter model of the Tractor Beam for use on smaller craft. Popular among newbie miners who can't fly larger craft.

name: FOE: Heavy Tractor Beam
description: This heavier model boasts longer range to allow slower craft a more effective collection of floating materials be it ores or drifting cargo.

name: FS-14 Amber
description: Recent experiments in shield technology have produced a modified structure in the core of common shield generators. By injecting hyperdrive fuel, the shield generation efficiency could be doubled. 	Keep a look at your fuel display.

name: FS-23 Wulfenite
description: Recent experiments in shield technology have produced a modified structure in the core of common shield generators. By injecting hyperdrive fuel, the shield generation efficiency could be doubled. 	Keep a look at your fuel display.

name: FS-41 Pyrite
description: Recent experiments in shield technology have produced a modified structure in the core of common shield generators. By injecting hyperdrive fuel, the shield generation efficiency could be doubled. 	Keep a look at your fuel display.

name: FS-67 Aurum
description: Recent experiments in shield technology have produced a modified structure in the core of common shield generators. By injecting hyperdrive fuel, the shield generation efficiency could be doubled. 	Anything beyond this size creates stability issues, but works are in progress. 	Keep a look at your fuel display.

name: FOE: Laser Sight
description: A long range laser that does almost no damage but is used for target acquisition instead. Initially should have also the side effect to partly blind an opponent's optical tracking systems, but well, that did not work out because of things breaking the fourth wall if explaining them.

name: Engineering Room
description: An Engineering Room acts as a centralized control center for managing repairs and regulating the flow of energy on your ship. This can make energy usage by certain outfits more efficient while also alleviating effects that negatively impact your ship. A skilled engineering crew who understands how these systems work and interact with each other is essential to Engineering Room operations. 	Engineering Rooms are also often the location where a ship's self-destruct sequence is activated. Typically it involves deliberately causing a reactor meltdown in the ship's power systems or some similar catastrophic failure. At a minimum, this usually requires the cooperation of both the captain and the engineering crew.

name: Slave
description: Although considered illegal by almost every government for hundred of years, slavery is still very common on pirate and anarchist planets. A slave can replace a crew member in everything but close combat, in order to avoid giving them a chance to escape. One problem with slaves is the risk of them rebelling and taking over the ship, which can be mitigated by keeping enough standard crew to stop any insurrection with force.

name: Active Radar Jammer
description: Developed as a more effective alternative to Lovelace's design, this radar jammer requires a small amount of energy to function. It is often seen in pirate warships, where combat is frequent and missiles a constant treat.

name: Small Interference Emitter
description: This interference emitter has similar capabilities to the interference plating, utilising outfit space more efficiently at the cost of a constant energy consumption. One of these is enough to halve the chance of a successful scan.

name: Large Interference Emitter
description: The larger version of the interference emitter is quite powerful, capable of stopping roughly four out of five scan attempts alone although with the same downside of its smaller brother. Often the preferred choice of smugglers, perfect for passing through high security sectors with illegal cargo.

name: Javelin Pod Turret
description: A popular, although unofficial, modification to the Javelin Pod allows it to be mounted in a rotating turret mount making it much more effective. A bit more inaccurate than the base model, it is still a powerful weapon for its size and is usually mounted in the warships that lack the space for comparable energy-based weapons.

name: Outfit Expansion (Small)
description: The smaller outfit expansion allows you to sacrifice that last corner of cargo space in order to perhaps make room for one more outfit, in those situations where you need just seven more tons to install that last system. 	Unfortunately, rearranging the interior of your ship in such a fundamental way tends to interfere with its cooling systems.

name: Living Space Removal
description: Living Space Removal just gains back space occupied by Living Quarters. Crew generally despise captains using this for obvious reason. It also increases loading & unloading times with the location not being always optimal.

name: Marine Gear
description: Everything a space marine needs to perform his duty.

name: Ranger Gear
description: Everything a space ranger needs to fight for freedom.

name: Trooper Gear
description: Everything space troopers need to protect the property of their employer.

name: Extended Bunk Room
description: Increases the space a normal bunk room would give by half, at the cost of a higher mass and more outfit space taken up.

name: Sizeable Map
description: This data chip contains complete information on 100 systems in proximity to the system you are currently in.

name: Type 0 Radiant Engines
description: This engine works as both steering and a thruster, allowing smaller ships to save space on engines.

name: Type 5 Radiant Thruster
description: Created as a result of the increased need for bigger engines on their new warships, this thruster is the biggest thruster yet to be used by the Wanderers

name: Type 5 Radiant Steering
description: Created as a result of the increased need for bigger engines on their new warships, this steering was developed alongside the new thruster for the Wanderers warships.

name: Volcano Afterburner Steering
description: A steering afterburner works by dumping hyperspace fuel into your engines and igniting it, turning the ship around very quickly; but you must be careful to avoid using up so much fuel that you do not have enough left for hyperspace travel. 	This steering afterburner will only respond to your ship's normal steering controls, as it doesn't have a specific input for afterburner-assisted steering.

name: Caldera Afterburner Steering
description: This version of the Caldera Afterburner is designed for heavy warships, allowing otherwise slow-turning ships to keep track of a faster target. 	This steering afterburner will only respond to your ship's normal steering controls, as it doesn't have a specific input for afterburner-assisted steering.

name: Heavy Rocket Turret
description: An unholy mating of Lovelace's targeting systems and Delta V's heavy ordnance, this fearsome weapon mounts two Heavy Rocket pods on a turret, along with the associated loading mechanisms for two full-sized launchers. Able to reduce any small ship to a rapidly expanding cloud of debris from any azimuth with a single salvo, its capacity for destruction is offset only by its immense mass and slow traverse rate.

name: Meteor Missile Turret
description: Providing Meteor Missiles with an omnidirectional launch capability widens the selection of valid targets and use cases for the munition, however the slow acquisition rate of the turret makes it better used at longer ranges. Missiles are launched in pairs from two sets of tubes.

name: Sidewinder Missile VLS
description: As the Sidewinder Missile is maneuvrable enough that it would not benefit much from a conventional turret mount, large Sidewinder Missile systems typically take the form of space-efficient vertical launch arrays. These weapons are capable of rapidly launching many missiles in quick succession, overcoming nearly any anti-missile defense through sheer volume of fire.

name: Dual Mining Laser Turret
description: While asteroid miners typically prefer more nimble ships that can keep speed with asteroids, the Mining Laser Turret makes it easier for large and slow ships with spacious cargo holds to mine. 	Mining Laser Turrets are designed to be used in conjunction with asteroid scanners, as being unable to target asteroids means you have to aim the weapon manually as if it were a fixed gun.

name: Heavy Meteor Missile Launcher
description: The Meteor Missile's large warhead can spell doom for poorly-defended targets when fired in great numbers, and this multi-launcher helps with that, loading its ammunition sequentially onto a set of rails that allow a large number to be fired quickly at once. 	Reloads take a long time, but the burst-fire potential allows strike-craft pilots freedom to employ hit-and-run tactics, as opposed to streadily streaming out volleys every second from a standard missile launcher.

Ships: Cruiser (KGS Dual Particle Cannon Mark II)
G-Class Container Transport (MGF: Heavy Pulse Blaster)
SV40-n Navilel (MGF: Heavy Pulse Blaster, SD1 Regenerator)
MGF: Spetum Class (Spetum Class (Mark II, Jump))
MGF: Spetum Class (Spetum Class (Mark II, ShieldRegen))
MGF: Spetum Class (Spetum Class (Mark II, Typhoon Storage))
MGF: Spetum Class (Spetum Class (ZOE: Shield, Mark II))

weapon.stream: # needs to be re-added if weapon is modified

# more beneficial to use this mode now, to maintain hit force on target and avoid launching such a dense flurry of missiles that earlier ones in the volley push the target out of range of the following ones

weapon.cluster: # uses this instead of missile strength so anti-missile can't destroy the 1-frame-lifetime projectile before it splits into the submunitions

name: FOE: Barrage Missile
description: A small missile designed by the Republic Navy to give fighters and drones more firepower, it was purpose built to be fired in large waves, hence its name.

name: FOE: Barrage Storage
description: A safe storage for the Barrage Missiles.

name: FOE: Barrage Launcher
description: A fast firing launcher made for compact ships, it was designed to lay down a large amount of missile fire to overwhelm enemy countermeasures to allow stronger missiles in.

name: FOE: Broadsider Slug
description: A Heavy slug made primarily of Tungsten.

name: FOE: Broadsider Storage
description: The Broadsider makes use of large magazines for loading new shells. These magazines are loaded by a crew member in an industrial exosuit.

name: FOE: Broadsider
description: As part of the Navy's 'New Age Initiative,' the team at Geminus has developed larger and more powerful weaponry to function on their new ships. The Broadsider is one such weapon created for the Battleship and meant to hit harder than anything humanity has to offer.

name: Hamster Plasma Engines
description: As a response to the Syndicate's unified Ion engine block, Delta V designed a similarly simple component, joining components of their Chipmunk engines into one unit. The engines come in a container displaying a highly motivated hamster running so fast it breaks right through its wheel. 	Plasma engines are a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less energy efficient and produce more heat.

name: A100 Atomic Engines
description: Deep Sky joined the race for miniaturized engine systems relying heavily on marketing this compact set of atomic engines as the most reliable and compact option for both drones and fighters.

name: FOE: Compressed Fuel Pod
description: For some of their most fuel hungry outfits, the Free Worlds needed a fuel pod that would be able to store more fuel on smaller ships. The Compressed Fuel Pod does just that, but it comes at the expense of a small amount of energy to run the internal pump, and is more prone to fuel leakage and other failures.

name: FOE: Plasma Howitzer
description: The Plasma Howitzer is an experimental augmentation of the Plasma Cannon that uses strong magnets to bind together an oversized plasma projectile, before stuffing the projectile with a bit of hyperspace fuel and launching it. These projectiles are highly unstable, to the point where even a bare graze is enough to release the plasma explosion. 	To keep the magnets cooled enough to function, the weapon must directly tap from the ship's normal cooling systems.

name: FOE: Plasma Repeater Turret
description: This turret places two Plasma Repeaters on one big mount, with a creative twist: The firing clocks have been tweaked so each individual gun fires slightly faster, allowing the turret to overall more effectively saturate an area. Because of its effectiveness, the Free Worlds have restricted the sale of this weapon to its Militia only.

name: FOE: R0152 Naval Shield
description: Navy ships have to deal with combat more frequent and dangerous than most civilian ships will ever see. As such, the Navy utilizes these more advanced shield generators to allow even their fighters to recover quickly. 	Navy shield generators work by cycling far more power through the generator, providing an increase to space efficiency at the cost of consuming extra energy and producing heat while generating shields.

name: FOE: R0238 Naval Shield
description: The Navy lacks any sort of dedicated interceptor, so their shield technology skips a size of generator. These shields are capable of supporting most of the Navy's light to medium warships, providing an edge over any equivalent civilian shield generator. 	Navy shield generators work by cycling far more power through the generator, providing an increase to space efficiency at the cost of consuming extra energy and producing heat while generating shields.

name: FOE: R0376 Naval Shield
description: This generator is designed to service the Navy's capital ships, consuming considerable energy and potentially requiring extra cooling. However, it vastly outperforms any civilian shield generator for its size. 	Navy shield generators work by cycling far more power through the generator, providing an increase to space efficiency at the cost of consuming extra energy and producing heat while generating shields.

name: FOE: R0518 Naval Shield
description: This is the largest and most powerful shield generator produced for the Navy, found exclusively on Navy Auxiliaries. It is capable of outperforming virtually any other shield generator in human space, while remaining relatively affordable in terms of energy and healing requirements. 	Navy shield generators work by cycling far more power through the generator, providing an increase to space efficiency at the cost of consuming extra energy and producing heat while generating shields.

name: FOE: PDP016 Battery Pack
description: Though one of the Syndicate's main businesses is in producing and selling civilian outfits, it also produces higher quality outfits for its security forces. These batteries are quite dense, but carry far more energy than a typical human battery of the same size.

name: FOE: PDP032 Battery Pack
description: This larger battery made by the Syndicate allows a ship to store an even greater amount of energy in a compact package.

name: FOE: PDP064 Battery Pack
description: The Syndicate's largest battery stores more energy than the largest civilian battery, for twenty percent less space. It does, however, weigh substantially more than a normal battery of similar size.

name: FOE: Sentinel Reactor
description: Named for its intended use in the Vanguards and Protectors of the Syndicated Security fleet, the revolutionary Sentinel Reactor by Synatom is an enlarged breeder reactor with a powerful adaptive liquid sodium cooling system. Even when the ship is heated up maximally the reactor still provides as much energy as a breeder, but only generates the heat of a basic fission reactor. At that the compact design reduces its size by one third of the expected.

name: FOE: Covalent Proton Turret
description: This turreted pair of Proton Guns uses some crafty engineering to allow both guns to draw from a singular enlarged projectile generator. This allows the turret mount itself to be larger, permitting the whole assembly to turn faster than other turrets of its size. 	The shared projectile generator also has some quirks; namely, the generator is prone to power overdraw - a bug since rebranded by the Syndicate's advertising department as an intended feature, as the overdraw tends to yield surplus proton projectile mass, increasing damage on target.

name: Flak Cannon
description: Designed to take down fast moving targets from a distance, the flak cannon fires shells that explode as soon as the target is in the blast radius.

name: Flak Shell
description: A rather expensive state of the art shell containing a small sensor for accurate mid-space detonation.

name: Plasma Turret (Single)
description: The Single Plasma Turret is one plasma cannon mounted on a turret to fire in any direction. While not as powerful as the dual Plasma Turret, it is able to fit on much smaller ships.

name: Barrage Blaster Turret
description: Trading some accuracy for fire rate and long range coverage, this turret engages targets with an intense barrage fire.

name: Heavy Blaster Turret
description: Turreted version of the Heavy Blaster. While it's significantly larger than Proton Turrets it's also capable of outputting more fire power to combat larger warships.

name: Nuclear Missile Ammo
description: Nuclear missile as ammunition for Nuclear Missile Turret.

name: Nuclear Missile Turret
description: Nine little nukes on a rotating mount. One was fired, and then there were eight...

name: Particle Turret
description: The Particle Turret is a versatile weapon with long range, high accuracy, and is able to track fast targets better than heavier turrets. It also has a high hit force which can throw small ships off course.

name: Particle Turret (Dual)
description: The Dual Particle Turret is a versatile weapon with long range, high accuracy, and good target tracking. It also has a high hit force which can throw small ships off course.

name: FOE: Heavy Particle Turret
description: The Heavy Particle Turret hammers a contrahent with such violence that even larger ships can be thrown off course. However, there is also no gun version of this weapon because there is no point to install it on smaller ships which will be rendered uncontrollable for their pilots. Mainly used by commanders who prefer to employ their capital warships as mobile battle stations.

name: Shipwright Gear
description: As luck has it, many people offering their services as ship crew are actually skilled in some engineering background. With the right provisions they could be put to work reinforcing the hull of a ship under times of stress. 	Specialists among the crew require higher wages, as well as space for their equipment, but offer services not covered by regular crew members.

name: Hesperian Toolbox
description: Hesparian is the only company from Mars which got any notability. Though its heyday is long bygone, two products are still well-known, one of them being its tools. The widely used toolbox not just simply provides compartments to store tools, but also a small diagnostical computer and all kind of connectors. 	As luck has it, many people offering their services as ship crew are actually skilled in some engineering background. Specialists among the crew require higher wages, as well as space for their equipment, but offer services not covered by regular crew members.

name: HTS Duct-Tape
description: Hesperian is the only vendor providing duct-tape certified for use in space. Proven emergency solution to prevent a damaged ship from falling apart. Enough duct-tape also allows to attach more weaponry. Too much duct-tape might cause cooling issues.

name: HTS Artisan
description: This Hesparian Toolset contains everything to repair a ship's hull on the fly, even while being under attack.

name: HTS Crafter
description: This Hesparian Toolset contains everything to maximize the output of the ship's shield matrix.

name: Hesperian Red Lager
description: Hesparian is the only company from Mars which got any notability. Though its heyday is long bygone, two products are still well-known, one of them being the Red Lager. For a can of this premium beer, spacefarers come from all known space to Mars, ready to pay a day's wage. Everybody has an other conspiracy theory, why the Red Lager was banned from sale on every other planet. 	(Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to fly a ship and operate its equipment.)
